scenario.name: GenCall - Stress Test
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "GenCall-Stress" <sip:stress[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:stress[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=GenCall 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=Stress Test c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "GenCall-Stress" <sip:stress[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "GenCall-Stress" <sip:stress[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
